chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.2760 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of bail application 1. For orders on M.A. No.14724/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on office objections a/w reply at flag “A”, 3. For orders on M.A. No.14725/2025 (Ex/A). 4. For hearing of bail application..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 13.10.2025 M/s. Liaquat Ali Khaskheli and Zameer Ali Soomro, Advocates for the Applicant a/w Applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. Through this Criminal Bail Application, the applicant/accused Syed Haris Ahmed seeks protective bail in FIR No.190/2025 under Section-489-F PPC, registered at P.S Mithadar. Learned counsel for the applicant/ accused contends that the applicant/accused is innocent and has falsely been implicated in the present case with malafide intention; that the applicant intends to surrender before the trial Court for his bail but apprehends of his arrest at the doorstep of the Court by the hands of police, hence this application for protective bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for a period of 10 days from today i.e 13.10.2025 to 22.10.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. This protective bail shall cease to have its effect after expiry of 10 days period i.e. 22.10.2025 or when the Applicant surrenders himself before the trial Court, whichever be earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case, the applicant fails to make his appearance before the trial Court within a prescribed time, the surety submitted before this Court shall stand forfeited.

This protective bail shall cease to have its effect after expiry of 10 days period i.e. 22.10.2025 or when the Applicant surrenders himself before the trial Court, whichever be earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case, the applicant fails to make his appearance before the trial Court within a prescribed time, the surety submitted before this Court shall stand forfeited. Instant bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
